bird.name: Maui parrotbill
bird.summary: The kiwikiu or Maui parrotbill (Pseudonestor xanthophrys) is a species of Hawaiian honeycreeper endemic to the island of Maui in Hawaii. It…

locations.name: Hawaiian tropical rainforests
locations.summary: The Hawaiian tropical rainforests are a tropical moist broadleaf forest ecoregion in the Hawaiian Islands.

locations.name: 哈雷阿卡拉火山
locations.summary: 哈莱阿卡拉火山（英語：Haleakalā）是位於美國夏威夷州的一座火山。哈莱阿卡拉火山的規模十分巨大，佔去茂宜島面積的75%。哈莱阿卡拉火山山頂的海拔高度是 10,023英尺（3,055米）。哈莱阿卡拉火山在歷史上曾經多次噴發，但目前狀態…

locations.name: Hawaiian tropical dry forests
locations.summary: Hawaiian tropical dry forests are a tropical dry broadleaf forest ecoregion in the Hawaiian Islands.

locations.name: 摩洛凱島
locations.summary: 摩洛凱島（英語：Molokai）是美國夏威夷州管轄的一個火山島。島上最高峰是海拔1512米的卡瑪庫山。摩洛凱島是夏威夷群島中面積第五大的島嶼，俗称「友善之岛」。面積670平方公里。島上人口約7000。與毛伊島、瓦胡島、拉奈島相鄰。 在夏威…

relations.subject: Maui parrotbill
relations.evidence: It can only be found in of mesic and wet forests at on the windward slopes of Haleakalā. This species is critically endangered, with an estimated population in 2016 of 250-540 individuals, but more recent estimates of less than 150 individuals. Fossil evidence indicates that the bird could at one time be seen in dry forests at elevations as low as , as well as on the island of Molokai

relations.subject: Maui parrotbill
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
